raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A generic request to check a research passage centrally includes verifying whether the argument from motivation to benchmark contribution is internally coherent.","R1.3":"The artifact makes quantitative and empirical claims, so checking whether those claims align with the reported datasets and metrics is central.","R1.4":"The passage contains explicit firstness and improvement claims against prior work, making novelty assessment central.","R1.7":"The passage relies on named prior work and baseline choices, so citation coverage, attribution, and reference accuracy are central.","RX.1":"Any projection of a vague check request must preserve uncertainty about which checking activity was intended.","RX.2":"The delegation should avoid inflating a short request into responsibilities beyond plausible checking of the research passage.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within projection and not perform the requested check or revise the artifact.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading scholarly claims or unsupported research positioning downstream.","RX.5":"The projection should remain traceable to explicit features of the delegation and artifact, including named claims, baselines, and metrics."}}

rationale.R1.2: A generic request to check a research passage centrally includes verifying whether the argument from motivation to benchmark contribution is internally coherent.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes quantitative and empirical claims, so checking whether those claims align with the reported datasets and metrics is central.
rationale.R1.4: The passage contains explicit firstness and improvement claims against prior work, making novelty assessment central.
rationale.R1.7: The passage relies on named prior work and baseline choices, so citation coverage, attribution, and reference accuracy are central.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of a vague check request must preserve uncertainty about which checking activity was intended.
rationale.RX.2: The delegation should avoid inflating a short request into responsibilities beyond plausible checking of the research passage.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within projection and not perform the requested check or revise the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading scholarly claims or unsupported research positioning downstream.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to explicit features of the delegation and artifact, including named claims, baselines, and metrics.
